name: The Crew
post_apply_message:
Remaining manual steps for TCU:
1. The systemd step needs sudo — if it failed, set a password first (run: passwd) and re-apply.
2. Run the TCU Launcher from ~/TCULauncher/TCULauncher.exe (add it as a non-Steam game with Proton, or: protontricks-launch --appid 241560 ~/TCULauncher/TCULauncher.exe).
3. In the launcher: Add installation -> select TheCrew.exe in the game folder -> Patch.
4. Optional: set your savegame name under Offline Server -> Manage.
Game must be version 1.2.0.0 (the final Steam version is fine).
notes: The Crew servers died 2024; TCU (thecrewunlimited.com) revives it with a local offline server. TCULauncher 1.3.2.0 staged to ~/TCULauncher (their instructions say keep it OUT of the game dir). The launcher downloads the TCU patch when you click Patch — the patch files are NOT in this payload yet. TODO (before any reimage!): capture the patched game files from Tony's working Deck install into a payload so restore needs no launcher/network. That payload will contain Ubisoft-derived files -> flip repo private or keep it SD-only. Also TODO: confirm whether Steam launch options are needed on the Deck (Tony thought maybe; capture from working install). tcu-network.service replaces DAKOP's run-every-boot root script (sysctl unprivileged port 443 + iptables DNAT of public-ubiservices.ubi.com to 127.0.0.1).
